response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified two distinct song sections in the video using on-screen text and audio.
2. Song 1: "Awakening Harmony". On-screen credits for composition point to Tabuchi Tomoya. Used query: '"Awakening Harmony" Tabuchi Tomoya Japanese and English lyrics'.
3. Song 2: "トライアングル・ドリーマー". On-screen credits for composition point to Fushimi Chika. Used query: '"トライアングル・ドリーマー" Fushimi Chika Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Extracted and structured the metadata based on the on-screen information for both songs.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performed at the Omaru Polka Birthday Festival 2026, featuring Omaru Polka and Houshou Marine. The performance includes 'Awakening Harmony' and 'Triangle Dreamer'.

scenes.description: Performers (Omaru Polka and Houshou Marine) sing 'Awakening Harmony' on stage. Text 'Awakening Harmony' appears in the lower third.
Performers transition to 'Triangle Dreamer'. Text 'トライアングル・ドリーマー' appears in the lower third.
